name: Barrio Logan Heights Gang
description: The Logan Heights Gang was established in Southeast San Diego when several Mexican-American street gangs from Barrio Logan unified, with roots tracing back to car clubs in the 1970s. They became notoriously known as enforcers for the Arellano-Felix Drug Organization (Tijuana Cartel), carrying out contract killings on both sides of the US-Mexico border. Members were arrested in 2024 for running a protection racket extorting businesses in Barrio Logan.

sources.title: DOJ - Strike Against San Diego Gangs
